session.title: AI-Assisted Instructional Design for Military Mountain Warfare Course
session.topic_summary: A user, acting as a military instructor, collaborated with an AI to develop a complete course framework for 'Small Unit Leadership in Mountain Warfare' based on a doctrinal publication. The session progressed from initial design, through iterative refinement, to the generation of multiple course artifacts including quizzes, documents, and strategic summaries.

axes.label: Instructional Design
axes.description: Ability to conceptualize and structure educational content.

axes.label: Technical Acumen
axes.description: Skill in handling and debugging technical formats like XML.

axes.label: AI Governance
axes.description: Effectiveness in directing, correcting, and collaborating with AI.

axes.label: Problem Solving
axes.description: Persistence and analytical skill in resolving complex errors.

axes.label: Strategic Vision
axes.description: Capacity to see beyond the task to its broader implications and value.

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Information Recall
blooms_progression.description: Provided the AI with the MCRP 12-10A.1 doctrinal publication as the foundational source of truth.

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Conceptual Interpretation
blooms_progression.description: Discussed the meaning and implications of leadership challenges like 'cocooning' and corrected the AI's interpretation of chapter titles.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Practical Application
blooms_progression.description: Directed the AI to apply doctrinal knowledge to create a course framework and a detailed FRAGO for the final exercise.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Systematic Analysis
blooms_progression.description: Analyzed Moodle error messages and screenshots to systematically diagnose the root cause of XML formatting failures.

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Critical Evaluation
blooms_progression.description: Evaluated the AI's performance, identified its errors, and prompted for strategic documents analyzing the ROI and value of the entire process.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Generative Creation
blooms_progression.description: Created a complete suite of net-new course artifacts: a full POI, multiple quizzes, discussion prompts, and professional documentation (PDFs/DOCX).

timeline.title: Project Inception
timeline.description: User defined the role of 'Gunnery Sergeant' and tasked the AI with creating a course framework from a doctrinal PDF.

timeline.title: Iterative Design
timeline.description: User identified flaws in the initial AI-generated framework, leading to collaborative refinement and integration of missed doctrinal concepts.

timeline.title: Artifact Generation
timeline.description: AI generated a suite of course materials including a FRAGO, PDF documents, and Moodle XML quiz files.

timeline.title: Technical Debugging Loop
timeline.description: Encountered persistent XML formatting errors. The user provided precise feedback via screenshots, guiding the AI through multiple correction cycles.

timeline.title: Problem Resolution & Mastery
timeline.description: The specific root cause of the XML error was identified and corrected, leading to the successful generation of all remaining assessments.

timeline.title: Meta-Cognitive Analysis
timeline.description: User prompted the AI to shift perspective, asking for a how-to guide, a strategic summary, and a detailed analysis of the session itself.

employer_value.title: Accelerated Training Development
employer_value.description: Demonstrated the ability to compress a multi-week course design and development cycle into a matter of hours, delivering ready-to-use materials at exceptional speed.

employer_value.title: Human-AI Teaming
employer_value.description: Masterfully governed an AI partner, providing precise feedback to overcome technical challenges and improve the quality of the final product, acting as a true force multiplier.

employer_value.title: Full-Spectrum Execution
employer_value.description: Showcased end-to-end project capability, from high-level strategic design and doctrinal analysis to hands-on technical production and debugging.

employer_value.title: Strategic & ROI-Focused
employer_value.description: Proactively analyzed the process to document new efficiencies, quantify value, and create scalable workflows, demonstrating a vision for organizational improvement.

portfolio.title: AI-Powered Curriculum Development for Military Training
portfolio.subtitle: SELF-DIRECTED · APPLIED · DOCUMENTED

meta.notes: The user's persistence and high-quality feedback during the XML debugging phase were critical to the session's success. This demonstrated an exceptional ability to guide an AI through a complex, iterative troubleshooting process to achieve a specific technical outcome. The final ROI and value metrics are high due to the clear demonstration of compressing a significant workload.
